category_sources: official GitHub README describes Enchant as a generic spell-checking library abstraction.
display_name_sources: official README and homepage use Enchant/libenchant as the project name.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official documentation site; official README says API documentation is available online via the home page and in doxygen/html.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/rrthomas/enchant, so repo is not re-determined.
tags_sources: official README lists C and C++ bindings and describes a spell-checking library with multiple backends.
